title: Fragment: The Lady Of The South.
content:
Faint with love, the Lady of the South
    Lay in the paradise of Lebanon
    Under a heaven of cedar boughs: the drouth
    Of love was on her lips; the light was gone
    Out of her eyes -
meaning:
"Fragment: The Lady Of The South." is a quintessential example of Percy Bysshe Shelley's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
